de.name: Tägliches Kunden-Briefing
de.description: Kunden-Tagesbriefing — Dubletten, fehlende Pflichtfelder, Bonitätsrisiken, VIP-Pflege — täglich um 07:00.

prefill.name: Tägliches Kunden-Briefing
prefill.description: 3-4 wichtigsten Kunden-Stammdaten-Themen für den Tag — Dubletten, Pflichtfelder, Bonität, VIPs.

angles: Neuanlagen der letzten 24h ohne vollständige Stammdaten

en.name: Daily Customer Briefing
en.description: Customer daily briefing — duplicates, missing fields, credit risks, VIP care — every day at 07:00.

prefill.name: Daily Customer Briefing
prefill.description: Top 3-4 customer master-data topics for today — duplicates, fields, credit, VIPs.

angles: Customer duplicates (same address/VAT ID/email more than once)
Missing required fields (VAT ID, payment terms, shipping address)
VIP / top customers with no recent activity (outreach recommended)
Records created in the last 24h with incomplete master data
Customer agent jobs in requires_intervention (Address Change, Lead Score stuck)
